revision.text:
[[ja:八王子神社 (茅ヶ崎市)]] {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Hachioji Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = File:Hachioji shrine chigasaki 2023 Jan 20 various 15 51 06 283000.jpeg |location = {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|qid=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}, [[:en:Chigasaki, Kanagawa|Chigasaki City]], {{ill|Motomura (Chigasaki City)|ja|本村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motomura (Chigasaki City)|1=honmura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11520415}} 4-13-40 |coordinates ={{Coord|35.336655|N|139.412567|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |Deities = {{ill|Ichikishima-hime no Mikoto|ja|市杵島比売命|1=Ichikishima-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime no Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}}
{{ill|Tagirihime no Mikoto|ja|多紀理比売命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagirihime no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タキリビメ|1=Tagorihime|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10932870}} |Historical Rank = Former Village Shrine |Foundation = Unknown |location = {{ill|Chigasaki|qid=Q633911|1=Chigasaki}} }} '''Hachioji Shrine''' (八王子神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in [[:en:Chigasaki, Kanagawa|Chigasaki City]], {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|qid=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}. It holds the historical status of a former village shrine. == Deities == * {{ill|Hachioji Gongen|ja|八王子権現|1=Hachiōji Gongen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachioji Gongen|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiōji Gongen|qq=}} * {{ill|Ichikishima-hime no Mikoto|ja|市杵島比売命|1=Ichikishima-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime no Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}} * {{ill|Tagirihime no Mikoto|ja|多紀理毘売命|1=Tagorihime|2=ja|3=タキリビメ|4=fr|5=Takiribime|6=zh|7=多紀理毘賣命|1=Tagorihime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagirihime no Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagorihime|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} * {{ill|Tagitsuhime no Mikoto|ja|多岐都比売命|1=Tagitsuhime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime no Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タギツヒメ}} * {{ill|Ame-no-Hohi|ja|正勝吾勝速日天忍穂耳命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Hohi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Amenohohi no Mikoto|ja|天之菩卑能命|1=Ame no Hohi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amenohohi no Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame no Hohi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アメノホヒ}} * {{ill|Ameno-Koyane no Mikoto|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ameno-Koyane no Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アマツヒコネ}} * {{ill|Kotoshironushi no Kami|ja|活津彦根命|1=Ikutsuhikone|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotoshironushi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutsuhikone|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to イクツヒコネ|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11147583}} * {{ill|Kumano no Kusubisu no Mikoto|ja|熊野久須毘命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumano no Kusubisu no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to クマノクスビ|1=Kumanokusubi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11298796}} == History == The exact date and founder of Hachioji Shrine are unknown. However, it is considered the birthplace of Chigasaki’s origins, as the shrine grounds feature an ancient Kofun and the area is known as "Motomura," meaning the original village.[https://www.kanagawa-jinja.or.jp/search_dtl.php4?jid=671&cd=1206072&scd=&npg=0 Hachioji Shrine] - Kanagawa Shrine Association The shrine is historically significant for its association with martial prayers. During the Kamakura shogunate's downfall, {{ill|Nitta Yoshisada|en|Nitta Yoshisada|qid=Q1328796|lt=Nitta Yoshisada|1=Nitta Yoshisada}} prayed at the shrine before leading his forces against the {{ill|Hōjō clan|en|Hōjō clan|qid=Q834364|lt=Hōjō clan|1=Hōjō clan}}. After his victory, Yoshisada rebuilt the shrine’s structures in gratitude in 1335 ({{ill|Jianwu|en|Jianwu|qid=Q11065423|lt=Kenmu (Japan)|1=Jianwu}} 2).[https://www.townnews.co.jp/0603/2017/12/15/411399.html Hachioji Shrine Honmura Gokoku Shrine Achieves Long-Awaited Creation] - Town News (Chigasaki Edition), December 15, 2017 In 1649 ({{ill|Keian|en|Keian|qid=Q1146135|lt=Keian|1=Keian}} 2), the third shogun, {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|en|Tokugawa Iemitsu|qid=Q314481|lt=Tokugawa Iemitsu|1=Tokugawa Iemitsu}}, granted the shrine the title "Hachioji Gongen" along with over 500 koku of land. During the {{ill|Meiji Restoration|en|Meiji Restoration|qid=Q8707|lt=Meiji Restoration|1=Meiji Restoration}}, the shrine was renamed "Hachioji Shrine" following the {{ill|Shinbutsu bunri|en|Shinbutsu bunri|qid=Q1970535|lt=Shinbutsu bunri|1=Shinbutsu bunri}} edict. It was designated a village shrine in 1910 (Meiji 43). The {{ill|1923 Great Kantō Earthquake|ja|関東大震災|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1923 Great Kantō Earthquake|1=aftermath of 1923 Great Kantō earthquake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q3742341}} destroyed the shrine buildings, which were rebuilt by 1927 (Showa 2) through the contributions of local parishioners. The remnants of the earthquake-destroyed torii gate are preserved on the grounds.[https://stroll.work/spot/hachioji-jinja-shrine-chigasaki-honson Hachioji Shrine (Chigasaki, Honmura)] - Stroll.work == Sub-Shrines == * '''Honmura Gokoku Shrine''' **Dedicated to the 75 spirits of parishioners who perished in wars, including the {{ill|First Sino-Japanese War|en|First Sino-Japanese War|qid=Q178687|lt=First Sino-Japanese War|1=First Sino-Japanese War}}, {{ill|Russo-Japanese War|en|Russo-Japanese War|qid=Q159950|lt=Russo-Japanese War|1=Russo-Japanese War}}, and {{ill|World War II|en|World War II|qid=Q362|lt=Second World War|1=World War II}}. * '''Honmura Tenmangu''' **Dedicated to {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|ja|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara no Michizane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q382005}}. == Practical Information == ; location * 4-13-40 Motomura, [[:en:Chigasaki, Kanagawa|Chigasaki City]], {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|qid=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}} ; Access * Approximately 20 minutes on foot or 4 minutes by taxi from {{ill|Chigasaki Station|en|Chigasaki Station|qid=Q800622|lt=Chigasaki Station|1=Chigasaki Station}} on the {{ill|Tōkaidō Main Line|en|Tōkaidō Main Line|qid=Q1190152|lt=Tōkaidō Main Line|1=Tōkaidō Main Line}} and {{ill|Sagami Line|en|Sagami Line|qid=Q1208633|lt=Sagami Line|1=Sagami Line}} operated by {{ill|East Japan Railway Company|en|East Japan Railway Company|qid=Q499071|lt=JR East|1=East Japan Railway Company}}. == References == {{Reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{cite book|title=Great Japanese Geographic Series (New Edition of Sagami Province Fudoki Manuscripts)|volume=Vol. 38|chapter=Ōba Manor, Chigasaki Village, Hachioji Gongen Shrine|publisher=Yuzankaku|date=1932-8|id={{NDLJP|1179219/145}}}} {{translated page|ja|八王子神社 (茅ヶ崎市)|version=98713640|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:八王子神社 (茅ヶ崎市)]] [[ja:八王子神社]] {{wikidata link|Q119929568}} [[Category:Municipal History of Chigasaki]] [[Category:Pages linked to by wikidata]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Kanagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:Son-sha in Kanagawa Prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
